moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships, the third Grand Slam tennis tournament of the year, begins on Monday, June 29, bringing two weeks of world-class action to the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries, cream, and incredible tennis! Wimbledon 2026 serves up two weeks of unmissable action starting Monday.

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Who are you backing for glory? The world's best descend on SW19 from Monday for Wimbledon 2026. Game, set, match!

moments.title: Women's T20 World Cup Underway
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup is currently taking place across England, with the final set for July 5 in London, featuring 12 international teams.

angles.name: Current Action
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup is in full swing across England! Who's your pick to lift the trophy on July 5th?

angles.name: London Final
angles.copy: Catch the excitement of the ICC Women's T20 World Cup! The final showdown is happening right here in London on July 5th.

moments.title: Tour de France Begins
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France, cycling's most prestigious race, begins in Barcelona on July 4 and concludes in Paris on July 26.

angles.name: Grand Depart
angles.copy: The greatest show on two wheels is almost here! The Tour de France 2026 kicks off in Barcelona next Saturday, July 4th.

angles.name: Cycling Fever
angles.copy: Get ready for three weeks of epic climbs and thrilling sprints! The Tour de France starts July 4th.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean UK #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' has returned to the top of the Official Singles Chart for its 14th non-consecutive week, making it the longest-running UK Number 1 single of the 2020s.

angles.name: Chart Domination
angles.copy: Still no reining them in! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are back at UK No.1 with 'Rein Me In' for a massive 14th week – making chart history for the 2020s!

angles.name: Record Breaker
angles.copy: 14 weeks at No.1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is officially the longest-running UK chart-topper of the decade so far. What a track!

moments.title: World Cup Song Climbs Charts
moments.blurb: Shakira and Burna Boy's 'Dai Dai,' the official song of the FIFA World Cup 2026, has climbed into the UK Top 20 for the first time at Number 19.

angles.name: Football Anthem
angles.copy: Goal! Shakira & Burna Boy's 'Dai Dai' is climbing the charts, now in the UK Top 20! Is this the official anthem of the FIFA World Cup 2026 getting you in the mood?

angles.name: Chart Success
angles.copy: Shakira and Burna Boy are scoring big on the charts with 'Dai Dai', the FIFA World Cup 2026 official song, now a Top 20 hit! What a collaboration!

moments.title: Olivia Rodrigo Album at UK #1
moments.blurb: Olivia Rodrigo's third regular album, 'YOU SEEM PRETTY SAD FOR A GIRL SO IN LOVE', has retained the top spot on the UK Official Albums Chart for a second consecutive week.

angles.name: Album Chart Queen
angles.copy: Two weeks at #1! Olivia Rodrigo continues her reign on the Official Albums Chart with 'YOU SEEM PRETTY SAD FOR A GIRL SO IN LOVE.' What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Must-Listen Album
angles.copy: Still can't get enough of Olivia Rodrigo's chart-topping album! 'YOU SEEM PRETTY SAD FOR A GIRL SO IN LOVE' holds strong at #1.

moments.title: UK Heatwave Forecast to Return
moments.blurb: After a brief cool-down, UK weather maps predict another scorching heatwave in early July, with temperatures potentially reaching 29-38°C from July 8 onwards across central and southern England and parts of Wales.

angles.name: Heatwave Prep
angles.copy: Heads up, the heat is coming back! Temperatures could hit 38°C in parts of the UK from July 8. Stay cool and hydrated!

angles.name: Summer Scorcher
angles.copy: Another heatwave is on the horizon for Devon and beyond! Forecasts suggest temperatures could soar into the 30s next week. How are you staying cool?

moments.title: Kent Water Use Ban
moments.blurb: South East Water has announced a temporary use ban in Kent, effective July 3, to manage high water demand following the recent heatwave.

angles.name: Water Restrictions
angles.copy: Important for Kent residents: a temporary water use ban comes into effect July 3rd due to high demand. Let's all do our bit to conserve water!

angles.name: Conserve Water
angles.copy: With hot weather returning, South East Water is implementing a temporary use ban in Kent from July 3. Every drop counts!

moments.title: Wales vs Barbarians Rugby
moments.blurb: Wales played a warm-up match against the Barbarians at Twickenham today, June 27, ahead of their Nations Championship campaign.

angles.name: Match Day Buzz
angles.copy: The Barbarians took on Wales at Twickenham today! What a clash – were you watching the action?

angles.name: Post-Match Chat
angles.copy: How did Wales fare against the Barbarians today? Get your post-match thoughts in!

moments.title: Fiji v Wales Rugby Match
moments.blurb: Wales begin their inaugural Nations Championship campaign by facing Fiji at Cardiff City Stadium on Saturday, July 4, 2026.

angles.name: Big Game Coming
angles.copy: Get ready, Wales! The Nations Championship kicks off next Saturday, July 4th, with Fiji at Cardiff City Stadium. Who's excited?

angles.name: Home Soil Action
angles.copy: A rare and thrilling matchup on home soil! Wales take on Fiji in the Nations Championship opener on July 4th. Don't miss it!

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger's Birthday
moments.blurb: Nicole Scherzinger, the lead singer of The Pussycat Dolls and TV personality, turns 48 on June 29, 2026.

angles.name: Pop Queen Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 48th birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger on June 29th! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls track?

angles.name: 00s Icon
angles.copy: From 'Don't Cha' to solo hits, celebrating the powerhouse that is Nicole Scherzinger, who turns 48 on June 29th!

moments.title: Ryan Tedder's Birthday
moments.blurb: Ryan Tedder, the Grammy-winning frontman of OneRepublic and a prolific songwriter/producer for artists like Adele, Beyoncé, and Taylor Swift, turns 47 on July 1, 2026.

angles.name: Hitmaker Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 47th birthday to the man behind so many hits, Ryan Tedder of OneRepublic, on July 1st! His songwriting credits are insane!

angles.name: Songwriting Genius
angles.copy: Celebrating Ryan Tedder's 47th birthday on July 1st! From OneRepublic anthems to co-writing for the biggest stars, what's your favourite of his creations?

moments.title: Post Malone's Birthday
moments.blurb: American rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4, 2026.

angles.name: Rap Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 31st birthday to the one and only Post Malone on July 4th! What's your go-to Posty track?

angles.name: Celebrating Posty
angles.copy: From genre-bending hits to massive collaborations, celebrating Post Malone's 31st birthday on July 4th!

moments.title: Huey Lewis's Birthday
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, the iconic frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, known for 80s hits like 'The Power of Love,' turns 76 on July 5, 2026.

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: It's hip to be square! Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis on July 5th! What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News hit?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring sound of Huey Lewis on his 76th birthday, July 5th! His hits still sound 'new' to us!

moments.title: 50 Cent's Birthday
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson) celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6, 2026.

angles.name: Hip Hop Icon
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! Happy 51st birthday to the one and only 50 Cent on July 6th! What's your favourite track from the G-Unit boss?

angles.name: Celebrating a Legend
angles.copy: From 'In Da Club' to 'Candy Shop', celebrating 50 Cent's 51st birthday on July 6th! A true force in music and beyond.

moments.title: Ringo Starr's Birthday
moments.blurb: Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer of The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7, 2026.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on July 7th! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo?

angles.name: Iconic Drummer
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring legacy of Ringo Starr on his 86th birthday, July 7th! A true music icon.

moments.title: Exeter Lammas Fair Returns
moments.blurb: The historic Lammas Fair returns to Exeter on July 9, featuring the traditional White Glove procession, Morris dancers, and centuries-old civic traditions.

angles.name: Local Tradition
angles.copy: A piece of Exeter history returns! The ancient Lammas Fair is back on July 9th with its famous White Glove procession and Morris dancers. Don't miss it!

angles.name: Community Event
angles.copy: Mark your calendars for July 9th! Exeter's Lammas Fair promises a day of tradition, spectacle, and community spirit.

moments.title: Jazz on the Quay Continues
moments.blurb: Exeter's 'Jazz on the Quay' series offers free live jazz every Sunday afternoon throughout the summer, providing a perfect soundtrack to the season.

angles.name: Sunday Sounds
angles.copy: Soak up the summer vibes! Free live jazz continues every Sunday afternoon at Exeter Quay. Grab a spot and enjoy the music!

angles.name: Relax by the River
angles.copy: The perfect way to spend a Sunday in Exeter: live jazz on the Quay! What a fantastic free event for the community.

moments.title: St Thomas Splashpad Open
moments.blurb: St Thomas Splashpad in Exeter is open this weekend with reduced features due to a mechanical fault, with full operation expected early next week.

angles.name: Family Fun Update
angles.copy: Planning a trip to St Thomas Splashpad? It's open this weekend with reduced features, but full fun is expected early next week!

angles.name: Weekend Activity
angles.copy: Cool down this weekend! St Thomas Splashpad is open, and repairs are underway for full operation soon. Perfect for the kids!

moments.title: Love St Thomas Summer Festival
moments.blurb: The Love St Thomas Summer Festival returns to St Thomas Church in Exeter on Saturday, July 4, featuring live music, workshops, talks, and stalls.

angles.name: Community Festival
angles.copy: Get ready for a fantastic day! The Love St Thomas Summer Festival is back on July 4th with live music, workshops, and more!

angles.name: Local Fun
angles.copy: Looking for plans on July 4th? Head to the Love St Thomas Summer Festival for a great community day out!
